hero.headline: Create Stunning Digital Business Cards in Minutes
hero.subheadline: Join the digital networking revolution. Build professional, interactive business cards that make lasting impressions and drive real connections.

videoSection.title: Digital Business Cards
videoSection.subtitle: Environmentally friendly and easy to update

features.title: Everything you need to network like a pro
features.subtitle: Powerful features designed to make your networking more effective and professional.

lightningFast.title: Lightning Fast Creation
lightningFast.description: Build professional business cards in under 2 minutes with our intuitive drag-and-drop builder.

mobileFirst.title: Mobile-First Design
mobileFirst.description: Every card is optimized for mobile viewing with responsive layouts that look perfect on any device.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Track views, engagement, and contact saves with detailed analytics and insights.

qrCodes.title: Smart QR Codes
qrCodes.description: Generate dynamic QR codes that update automatically when you change your card details.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Bank-level encryption and privacy controls to keep your professional data secure.

globalReach.title: Global Reach
globalReach.description: Share your card instantly worldwide with customizable links and social integrations.

testimonials.title: Loved by professionals worldwide
